feat_fig_fighting_style.name: Fighter's Fighting Style
feat_fig_fighting_style.description: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one of the following options. You can't take the same Fighting Style option more than once.

style_archery.name: Archery
style_archery.description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

style_blind_fighting.name: Blind Fighting
style_blind_fighting.description: You have blindsight with a range of 3 meters.

style_defense.name: Defense
style_defense.description: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

style_dueling.name: Dueling
style_dueling.description: When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

style_gwf.name: Great Weapon Fighting
style_gwf.description: When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack you make with a melee weapon that you are wielding with two hands, you can reroll the die.

style_interception.name: Interception
style_interception.description: Use your reaction to reduce damage to a target within range by 1d10 + PB.

style_protection.name: Protection
style_protection.description: Use your reaction to impose disadvantage on an attack against an ally while wielding a shield.

style_superior_technique.name: Superior Technique
style_superior_technique.description: You learn one maneuver of your choice and gain one d6 superiority die.

style_thrown.name: Thrown Weapon Fighting
style_thrown.description: You can draw a weapon with the thrown property as part of the attack. +2 to damage rolls.

style_twf.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
style_twf.description: Add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack.

style_unarmed.name: Unarmed Fighting
style_unarmed.description: Unarmed strikes deal 1d6 (or 1d8) + STR. Deal 1d4 to grappled creatures.

feat_fig_second_wind.name: Second Wind
feat_fig_second_wind.description: Bonus action to regain 1d10 + Fighter level HP. (1/Short Rest)

feat_fig_action_surge.name: Action Surge
feat_fig_action_surge.description: Take one additional action on your turn. (1/Short Rest, 2 at Lvl 17).

feat_fig_signature_maneuver.name: Signature Maneuver
feat_fig_signature_maneuver.description: Choose a maneuver you can use once per initiative with a d6.

feat_fig_extra_attack.name: Extra Attack
feat_fig_extra_attack.description: You can attack twice (lvl 5), three times (lvl 11), or four times (lvl 20).

feat_fig_indomitable.name: Indomitable
feat_fig_indomitable.description: Spend a charge to succeed on a failed saving throw.

feat_fig_martial_versatility.name: Martial Versatility
feat_fig_martial_versatility.description: Replace a fighting style or maneuver when you gain an ASI.

feat_fig_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_fig_asi.description: Increase ability scores or select a feat.

man_ambush.name: Ambush
man_ambush.description: Add superiority die to Stealth or Initiative.

man_bait_switch.name: Bait and Switch
man_bait_switch.description: Switch places with a willing creature; add die to AC.

man_brace.name: Brace
man_brace.description: Reaction attack when a creature enters reach.

man_disarming.name: Disarming Attack
man_disarming.description: Force target to drop an item on hit.

man_trip.name: Trip Attack
man_trip.description: Attempt to knock a target prone on hit.

man_parry.name: Parry
man_parry.description: Reduce damage from a melee attack by die + DEX.

feat_sub_remarkable_athlete.name: Remarkable Athlete
feat_sub_remarkable_athlete.description: Add half PB to STR/DEX/CON checks. Increased jump distance.

feat_sub_survivor.name: Survivor
feat_sub_survivor.description: Regain 5 + CON mod HP at start of turn if below half HP.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

subclasses.name: Champion
subclasses.description: Focuses on raw physical power and honing deadly critical hits.

subclasses.name: Battle Master
subclasses.description: Masters of battlefield tactics and maneuvers.

subclasses.name: Rune Knight
subclasses.description: Uses the power of giant runes to augment martial prowess.

subclasses.name: Eldritch Knight
subclasses.description: Combines martial mastery with arcanist spellcasting.
